title: clear gui for minecraft
description:
fear mobs sneaking up on you?
not a problem with clear Gui
body:
Clear GUI Minecraft is a lightweight and refined resource pack designed to give players a cleaner, more readable, and more efficient in-game interface. The goal of the project is to reduce unnecessary visual noise while keeping the familiar Minecraft aesthetic fully intact. Every part of the interface — including menus, inventories, toolbars, and the main HUD — has been adjusted to improve clarity without distracting from gameplay. By sharpening icons, simplifying textures, and improving spacing, the pack allows players to manage their items, tools, and crafting more quickly and comfortably.

One of the practical benefits of this clearer interface is improved situational awareness. In the default UI, clutter or dark overlays can pull your attention away from what’s happening around you. With the streamlined design of Clear GUI Minecraft, it becomes easier to keep track of both your inventory and your surroundings at the same time. This reduces the chances of mobs sneaking up on you while you are opening chests, crafting, or adjusting your hotbar. Whether you’re a survival player focused on staying alert or someone who simply prefers a minimal and polished interface, this pack enhances readability and overall comfort without altering core gameplay.

# **thank you evryone who has supported me with this project!!**
